title: Earlier Operations-Visibility History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency Operations Visibility decision and execution records so those records no longer read like live next-slice or operator guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 187, the other remaining earlier 2026-05-06 branch is the Operations Visibility decision and execution family. Packet 042 reopens the lane, Packet 043 selects the first bounded slice, Packets 044 through 047 carry the schema-tranche and advisor-boundary decisions and executions, Packet 048 lands the first browser consumer, Packet 049 records the lineage-drift boundary, and Packets 050 through 053 land the adjacent runtime consumers. Those records preserve already-closed business-lane evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live next-slice or operator guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the twelve targeted Olares Dev Residency handoffs as historical Operations Visibility records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the twelve targeted Olares Dev Residency packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the decision, execution, and observed-state evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
mutation-seam or AI-boundary transition normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted Operations Visibility handoff now leads as a historical record instead of live next-slice guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live decision or execution definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves any remaining adjacent residue for fresh reassessment afterward.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-042-post-041-operations-visibility-reentry-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-043-operations-visibility-post-041-first-bounded-slice-planning-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-044-bounded-operations-visibility-schema-deployment-preflight-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-045-operations-visibility-schema-tranche-security-invoker-and-advisor-path-remediation-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-046-supabase-advisor-access-recovery-and-execution-gate-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-047-operations-visibility-schema-tranche-live-execution-and-validation-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-048-operations-visibility-runtime-consumption-first-browser-consumer-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-049-operations-visibility-source-lineage-drift-boundary-decision-and-annotation-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-050-operations-visibility-schedule-health-runtime-consumption-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-051-operations-visibility-project-apparatus-summary-runtime-consumption-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-052-operations-visibility-apparatus-by-category-runtime-consumption-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-053-operations-visibility-blockers-summary-runtime-consumption-execution-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
